category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Datadog Static Analyzer as a static analysis tool for code quality and security.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description gives the product name; source_facts.homepage is official Datadog static analysis documentation.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Datadog documentation page for static analysis.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states static analysis for code quality and security; source_facts.executables lists analyzer and git hook commands.
